# CWE-1236 positive: CSV formula injection (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1236-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1236: Improper Neutralization of Formula Elements in a CSV File.
// Vulnerable: user comment written directly into CSV cell starting with =.

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

type FeedbackPure struct {
	ID      int
	Comment string
}

func ExportFeedbackCSVPure(rows []FeedbackPure) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		var b strings.Builder
		b.WriteString("id,comment\n")
		for _, row := range rows {
			line := fmt.Sprintf("%d,%s\n", row.ID, row.Comment)
			b.WriteString(line)
		}
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "text/csv")
		w.Write([]byte(b.String()))
	}
}
